meaning: adj.[字首][化] 重氮基,二氮化合物的
examples: Synthesis of sterically hindered dicyclohexylmethyl, L menthyl and tert butyl diazoacetate by diazo transfer was described on this paper.
Symmetrical diazo compounds, compositions comprising them, method of coloring, and device.
An acid yellow was synthesized by diazo and azo, and characterized by elementary analysis, IR and 1h-nmr.
